title: Webinar: Debugging Distributed Systems at 3am
description: A field guide to incident triage, from reading a flame graph under pressure to writing a blameless postmortem that actually gets read.

title: Regional Meetup: Tokyo Chapter Robotics Night
description: Live demos from three regional labs, lightning talks, and open networking hosted by the Meridian Tokyo chapter.

title: Workshop: Hands-On Post-Quantum Migration Lab
description: A half-day hands-on lab migrating a sample service to lattice-based key exchange, taught by the authors of the migration playbook.

title: Fireside Chat: Careers in Applied AI Safety
description: A candid panel with practitioners on how the AI safety discipline is professionalizing, and how to break in from adjacent fields.

title: Student Chapter Hackathon: Build for Accessibility
description: 48 hours, cross-disciplinary teams, and a judging panel of accessibility engineers — prizes for the most deployable assistive-tech prototype.

title: Executive Briefing: Carbon-Aware Infrastructure ROI
description: A data-driven briefing for engineering leaders on where carbon-aware scheduling pays for itself within 12 months.
